query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "minimax sparse attention" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (d) as it presents the "MiniMax-M1" model which explicitly implements and evaluates the "lightning attention" mechanism (a specific form of sparse attention) that is the core subject of the user's "MiniMax Sparse Attention" follow-up research. It provides the canonical empirical evidence and technical baseline for the specific mechanism the user is investigating.
